description: Physical and mental debuffs inflicted on the wielder. The price the body and mind pay for holding power.
limitations: Slow Weave
Magic thickens around the wielder like tar. Every incantation takes longer, every gesture feels heavy and sluggish.
Frostgrip
The surface radiates bitter cold. Hold it too long and numbness crawls up the wrist, then the arm.
Bright Surge
A blinding flash at the worst possible moment. The wielder's own success becomes a weapon against their sight.
Searing Hilt
Drawing it means a flash of fire across the palm. Brief, sharp, and impossible to avoid.
Shifting Hue
Hair and eyes change overnight without warning. The wielder wakes as a stranger in the mirror each dawn.
Widened Fumble
Misfortune clings to the wielder. Mistakes happen more often, and the small ones feel bigger.
Restless Nights
Sleep comes hard and stays short. The body demands twice the rest but the mind refuses to quiet.
Stolen Triumph
Great success slips through the wielder's fingers. The best moments get rerolled, reconsidered, and usually lost.
Muffled Step
Stealth becomes a memory. The wielder's careful silence unravels, every quiet step suddenly loud and clumsy.
Bitter Recall
Old pain surfaces after every use. A memory the wielder thought buried, vivid and sharp as the day it happened.
Empathic Lash
Every wound delivered echoes back through the wielder's nerves. You feel what you inflict, exactly as they feel it.
Draining Toll
Prolonged use hollows the wielder out. Exhaustion settles in the bones like lead after each extended session.
Fierce Kickback
The recoil hits like a mule. Wrists ache, shoulders bruise, and teeth rattle with every activation.
Dulled Reflex
Reaction time slows to a crawl. The wielder always feels one step behind when it matters most.
Coward's Weight
Fear grips harder while this is near. Courage shrinks and the urge to flee grows louder.
Waking Terrors
Sleep brings horrors. Vivid, screaming nightmares that leave the wielder drenched in sweat and unrested.
Lost Compass
North becomes south, left becomes right. The wielder wanders in circles for an hour after each use.
Slow Wither
The wielder's vitality ebbs week by week. A slow drain, barely noticed until the mirror shows the truth.
Healing Ward
Restorative magic slides off the wielder like oil on water. For a time after use, no healing can reach them.
Blank Minute
A fumble and the last minute vanishes. Gone completely. The wielder blinks and wonders what just happened.
Taste Thief
Food becomes cardboard, drink becomes water. Every flavor vanishes for a full day after activation.
Crossed Senses
Taste and smell swap places. Flowers have a flavor and meals have an aroma that makes no sense.
Wrong Hand
The dominant hand forgets itself when the item is drawn. Everything feels backward until the body adapts.
Last to Act
The wielder is always the slowest to react, even when surprise is on their side.
Blood Price
The item drinks from the wielder's own vitality. Each use costs a piece of the body's reserves.
Blackout
Consciousness folds. The wielder comes to later with no memory of what happened or what they did.
Wild Growth
Hair sprouts at an alarming rate. Beards, manes, and brows grow inches overnight.
Bare Patch
Hair falls in clumps. The wielder's scalp and brows thin visibly with continued use.
Waking Dreams
Things that are not there begin to move at the edge of vision. Whispers with no source. Shadows with no caster.
Bone Tired
Muscles ache, joints creak, and every step feels like the end of a long march. The body protests even at rest.
Creeping Doubt
Trust erodes. Every ally begins to look like a potential threat, every shadow hides an enemy.
Numbed Senses
The world dims. Colors flatten, sounds muffle, and the wielder moves through everything slightly disconnected.
Gut Rot
A sour burning in the belly that no meal can cure. The item's toll is felt in the stomach first.
False Memory
Memories shift and rearrange. The wielder remembers things that never happened and forgets things that did.
Ache
Using it hurts. Not a wound, just deep persistent pain that radiates from the hands and settles in the spine.
Crushing Heft
It weighs on the bearer like a millstone. Every step is a negotiation between will and gravity.
Deep Chill
Cold that no fire can warm. It settles in the chest and stays, a constant companion that drains comfort.
Fever Touch
An unnatural heat radiates from the item into the bearer's skin. Sweat beads, temper flares, and rest becomes impossible.
Hollow Belly
Ravenous hunger and parching thirst that no amount of food or water satisfies. The body demands and demands.
Prickling Skin
An incessant itch that moves just out of reach. Scratching never helps. The irritation is deeper than skin.
Narcolepsy
The wielder's eyelids grow impossibly heavy after each use. Sleep comes whether the moment is safe or not.
Hollow Heart
Joy, anger, sorrow, all of it fades. The wielder becomes calm and empty, watching the world without feeling it.
